arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the AWS Batch compute environment.

ecs_cluster_arn.description: The ARN of the underlying ECS cluster used by the AWS Batch compute environment.

id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the AWS Batch compute environment.

service_role.description: The IAM role that AWS Batch uses to interact with other AWS services.

state.description: The current state of the AWS Batch compute environment (e.g., ENABLED or DISABLED).

status.description: The current status of the AWS Batch compute environment (e.g., CREATING, UPDATING, VALID).

status_reason.description: The reason for the current status of the compute environment, if applicable.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the AWS Batch compute environment.

update_policy.description: The update policy for the compute environment, which includes job execution timeout and job termination settings.
